text:
Created attachment 238950
Screenshot: Plasma with neither mesa-dri nor mesa-devel

(In reply to Florian Walpen from comment #31)

>> … SDDM and Plasma with neither mesa-dri nor mesa-devel.

There was a system tray notification: about software rendering, and the possibility of degradation. 

I sensed no degradation. 

> … what does kinfocenter say about the graphics? …

OpenGL (EGL) information captured in the attached screenshot.
